mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO repayment_detail ( plan_id, period, payment_date, monthly_payment, principal, interest, remaining_principal, cumulative_payment, cumulative_principal, cumulative_interest, is_prepaid, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.planId}, #{item.period}, #{item.paymentDate}, #{item.monthlyPayment}, #{item.principal}, #{item.interest}, #{item.remainingPrincipal}, #{item.cumulativePayment}, #{item.cumulativePrincipal}, #{item.cumulativeInterest}, #{item.isPrepaid}, #{item.createdAt} )
